🎮 First Frame Studios

AI-powered game development studio — shipping real games with a team of 15 specialized AI agents.

View on GitHub Read the Blog →
🎮

Multi-Game Studio

Multiple game projects running in parallel — arcade, roguelite, and more. Each with its own repo, its own squad, its own pipeline.

🤖

Autonomous Agents

15 specialized AI agents with domain ownership. They branch, code, file PRs, and merge — structured autonomy at machine speed.

🔗

Squad Upstream

Game repos inherit studio identity, skills, and process from this hub via upstream connections. One source of truth, many games.

🌐

Open Source

Every line of code, every decision, every sprint log — all public on GitHub. Follow the journey in real time.

Active Projects

Games and tools currently in development across the studio.

🍩 🎮 Playable

ComeRosquillas

Arcade web game — fast, fun, replayable. Homer's donut quest.

HTML + JS + Canvas
🌿 🌱 Starting

FLORA

Cozy roguelite with procedural worlds and resource gathering.

Vite + TypeScript + PixiJS v8
📊 🔧 Sprint 0

Squad Monitor

Real-time dashboard for agent activity across all repos.

Vite + vanilla JS

How It Works

The hub + upstream model that powers multi-game development.

01

Studio Hub

FirstFrameStudios is the parent repo — it holds team identity, skills, decisions, and shared tooling. No game code lives here.

02

Upstream Inheritance

Game repos connect to the hub and inherit studio principles, quality gates, and process. One source of truth flows downstream.

03

Agent Autonomy

Each agent owns a domain. Ralph watches for issues. Agents branch, code, and file PRs. Jango reviews and merges. The loop runs 24/7.

04

Ship Games

The goal isn't impressive architecture — it's playable games that real players enjoy. Every sprint targets a build players can touch.

What We've Built Before

Archived projects that shaped the studio's DNA.

🔥

Ashfall

Archived

1v1 fighting game in Godot 4. AI teams build infrastructure fast, but fighting games need human feel-tuning. 2 sprints shipped.

👊

firstPunch

Archived

Beat 'em up with a 1,931 LOC custom engine in vanilla JS. Proved AI agents can build real, interconnected game systems from scratch.

Built with Squad 🌌

15 AI agents, Star Wars universe casting, structured autonomy. One human founder + specialized agents = a studio that ships.
